candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line at the top of the income statement; preferred over broader totals.
Revenue-related label, but appears as an alternate/changed label and not the main populated top-line in preview.
Revenue-related alternate label, but not the main reported top-line in preview.
Revenue subtype rather than total company revenue.
Cost line, not revenue.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Bottom-line income measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income-related, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income/(loss) for the period
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Non-Recurring Income/Expense - One time related to severance
candidates.why: Non-recurring expense, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset item, not revenue.
Liability-related balance sheet item, not revenue.

variables.notes: Use the reported top-line revenue label as priority list across years; 'Revenue' is clearly the primary choice.

candidates.row_label: Raw materials and consumables used and services expense
candidates.why: Direct production/service cost line above gross profit; best match for COGS.
Also a direct cost label and may be used in earlier years as the cost-of-sales line.
Subtotal/total that duplicates direct cost line amounts in recent years; less preferred than component wording.

final_choice.row_label: Raw materials and consumables used and services expense

variables.notes: Preferred direct cost rows over the subtotal 'Cost of Revenues - Total'. Ordered as priority list for label changes over time.

candidates.why: Core overhead/personnel expense and a strong SG&A component.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A component, but likely already included in salary/personnel or broader overhead lines; adding may risk double counting.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-related labor component, but likely overlaps with broader personnel costs.
Broad operating overhead bucket, appropriate when no populated explicit SG&A total exists.
Explicit SG&A row exists but appears unpopulated in preview; per rule it should be included along with closest overhead bucket for coverage across years.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|missing. Explicit SG&A row exists but is empty in preview, so included together with main overhead buckets per instruction. Excluded stock-based compensation and labor-in-SG&A subcomponents to avoid likely double counting with broader personnel/operating expense rows.
No dedicated research and development row is present in the income statement preview.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost total, but includes FX and other non-interest items, so less preferred than granular recurring interest components.
Direct recurring interest expense on borrowings; best core interest expense component.
Recurring financing cost on lease liabilities; should be included with interest expense.
Too generic and may overlap with total finance costs or include non-interest items.
Could contain recurring finance costs, but may also include non-interest items; secondary to explicit interest rows.
Not interest expense.
Semantically strong, but appears unpopulated and may be supplemental/duplicate versus explicit underlying rows.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease-interest line; avoid double counting if main lease-interest row selected.
Debt balance, not income statement interest expense.
Liability balance, not interest expense.
Debt balance, not interest expense.
Liability balance, not interest expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.

variables.notes: Selected granular recurring finance cost components and excluded 'Financial expense' total to avoid double counting. Included 'Other financial expenses' as the best available recurring residual finance-cost bucket, while excluding explicit FX gain/loss rows.

candidates.why: Income allocation line, not balance-sheet book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Income allocation line, not balance-sheet book equity.
Equity component, not total book equity.
Only paid-in capital component, not total equity.
Equity component, not total equity.
Best available total equity line on balance sheet; use because no separate parent-attributable equity line is shown.
Duplicate capitalization variant of the same total equity concept; useful as alternate label priority.

variables.notes: No owner/parent-attributable equity line appears on the balance sheet, so use total equity as BE. To avoid double counting, MIB is set to empty.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line rather than balance-sheet minority equity.
Correct balance-sheet minority interest label, but appears not reported/populated.
Income statement attribution/totals, not balance-sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Because BE uses 'Total equity' and no separate parent-equity line exists, MIB is left empty to avoid double counting. The balance sheet 'Non-controlling interest' row appears not to represent a separately reported amount.
